traceability.extracted_fact: Candidates who optimize for senior titles by switching companies every 1.5 years are not a fit
traceability.verbatim_text_quote: Title-chasers. If your career trajectory shows you optimizing for "Senior" → "Staff" → "Principal" titles by switching companies every 1.5 years, we're not a fit.

traceability.extracted_fact: Candidates who focus on frameworks rather than systems are not a fit
traceability.verbatim_text_quote: Framework enthusiasts. If your GitHub is full of LangChain tutorials and your blog posts are "How I used [hot framework] to build [demo]" — that's fine but it's not what we need. We need people who think about systems, not frameworks.

hard_disqualifiers.rejection_value: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini, etc.

traceability.extracted_fact: Candidates from consulting firms are not a fit
traceability.verbatim_text_quote: People who have only worked at consulting firms (TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini, etc.) in their entire career. We've had bad fit experiences in both directions.

traceability.extracted_fact: Candidates from closed-source proprietary systems are not a fit
traceability.verbatim_text_quote: People whose work has been entirely on closed-source proprietary systems for 5+ years without external validation (papers, talks, open-source). We need to see how you think, not just trust that you can think.

traceability.extracted_fact: Candidates need a stable codebase to be productive.
traceability.verbatim_text_quote: If you need a stable, mature codebase to be productive, you'll find this role unstable.

bounded_concept_expansions: production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems
vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure

semantic_targets.business_intent: We are building a new AI Engineering org from scratch at Redrob AI, a Series A company, and we need a Senior AI Engineer who can balance deep technical depth in modern ML systems and a scrappy product-engineering attitude.
semantic_targets.primary_persona: A candidate with 6-8 years of total experience, 4-5 in applied ML/AI roles at product companies, strong opinions on retrieval, evaluation, and LLM integration, and a proven track record of shipping systems to real users.
anti_personas: Someone with a well-scoped role and a defined ladder.
Someone who wants to 'just code' without thinking about product or recruiter workflows or evaluation frameworks.
candidates with a career in pure research environments without production deployment

A recent project developer using LangChain to call OpenAI, a senior engineer who hasn't written production code in the last 18 months, a candidate who hasn't thought about rigorous evaluation of ranking systems rigorously.
People who have only worked at consulting firms
People whose primary expertise is computer vision, speech, or robotics without significant NLP/IR exposure
People whose work has been entirely on closed-source proprietary systems for 5+ years without external validation
Candidates who find writing painful or who disagree openly and decide quickly.
Candidates who need a stable, mature codebase to be productive.
A candidate who has all the AI keywords listed as skills but whose title is 'Marketing Manager'

evidence_proof_expectations: 5-9 years of experience in modern ML systems including embeddings, retrieval, ranking, LLMs, and fine-tuning

traceability.extracted_fact: The role requires 5-9 years of experience in modern ML systems.
traceability.verbatim_text_quote: We need someone who is simultaneously comfortable with two things that sound contradictory: Deep technical depth in modern ML systems — embeddings, retrieval, ranking, LLMs, fine-tuning.

evidence_proof_expectations: Audit what Redrob currently has and identify the highest-leverage areas to improve

traceability.extracted_fact: Audit current systems and identify areas for improvement.
traceability.verbatim_text_quote: Audit what we currently have (it's mostly BM25 + rule-based scoring, working but not great). Identify the 3-4 highest-leverage things to fix.

evidence_proof_expectations: Demonstrably improve recruiter-engagement metrics with a v2 ranking system involving embeddings, hybrid retrieval, and LLM-based re-ranking

traceability.extracted_fact: Ship a v2 ranking system that demonstrably improves recruiter-engagement metrics.
traceability.verbatim_text_quote: Ship a v2 ranking system that demonstrably improves recruiter-engagement metrics. This will involve embeddings, hybrid retrieval, and probably some LLM-based re-ranking, but the architecture is your call.

evidence_proof_expectations: Set up offline benchmarks, online A/B testing, and recruiter-feedback loops

traceability.extracted_fact: Set up the evaluation infrastructure — offline benchmarks, online A/B testing, recruiter-feedback loops — so we can keep improving without flying blind.
traceability.verbatim_text_quote: Beyond that, you'll be driving the long-term architecture of how we do candidate-JD matching at scale, mentoring the next round of hires (we're growing the team from 4 to 12 engineers in the next year), and working closely with our recruiter-experience PM on what to build.

evidence_proof_expectations: Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems deployed to real users, such as sentence-transformers, OpenAI embeddings, BGE, E5, or similar, handling embedding drift, index refresh, and retrieval-quality regression in production.

traceability.extracted_fact: The role requires production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems.
traceability.verbatim_text_quote: Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems (sentence-transformers, OpenAI embeddings, BGE, E5, or similar) deployed to real users.
